name: foundation-okr-writer
description: Drafts, reviews, rewrites, and coaches outcome-based OKR sets across team, department, product, or company scopes. Supports five entry modes (Guided default, One-Shot via --oneshot, Sustained Coach, Audit Only, Rewrite). Diagnoses empowered-team context and adjusts framing; refuses to fabricate baselines or targets; refuses to use OKR scores for compensation; reframes feature-delivery KRs into outcome KRs. Use when planning quarterly OKRs, translating strategy into team outcomes, reviewing draft
author: product-on-purpose
summary_zh: 这是一款OKR写作与辅导工具，能帮你起草和修正目标，把功能交付指标转化为业务结果，拒绝虚报基线与挂钩绩效，适合季度规划或把战略落地为团队目标时使用。
